use_cases: Form input for selecting options from a predefined list in applications
Filter or category selection in dashboards and settings pages
Drop-in replacement for native HTML select elements with enhanced styling
ai_summary: A customizable select dropdown component featuring four size variants (xsmall to large), error state handling, and optional prefix/suffix slots for icons or text. Built with Tailwind CSS, it provides a clean, minimalist alternative to native select elements with proper form accessibility support. Includes error display capability and disabled state for comprehensive form validation scenarios.
